title: Sweet Dumplings with Flaky Crust
description: Delicious sweet dumplings wrapped in a flaky pastry crust, perfect for a dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: Flaky Pastry Dough
ingredients.notes: Available in most grocery stores or make your own

ingredients.name: Sweet Dumpling Filling
ingredients.notes: A mixture of sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract

ingredients.name: Dumpling Wrappers
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Granulated Sugar
ingredients.notes: For dusting the dumplings before baking

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: For flavoring the sweet dumpling filling

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of sweet dumpling filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the dumplings with egg wash and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
